name: Fasting-mimicking diet variants induced molecular autophagy markers
summary: A short randomized FMD study supports human biomarker movement but remains endpoint-limited.
statement: A 7-day randomized parallel-group study in 46 healthy adults reported molecular autophagy induction and cardiometabolic-marker movement after fasting-mimicking diet variants.
caveats: The intervention was short and tested healthy adults rather than an aging-impaired population.
The outcome mix remains biomarker and cardiometabolic-marker weighted.
Some authors had employment ties to companies involved in the diet products or testing.
